checkpoint_contract.crash_loss_bound: at most the current Europe PMC page or current claim sentence
checkpoint_contract.resume_rule: resume by loading state, skip existing PMID plus gene plus normalized sentence keys, continue the active cursor

day_2_rules.atlas_source: reuse full Marson table and current overnight atlas rows as the baseline
day_2_rules.coverage_expansion: new public perturbation substrates must be downloaded or API-captured, frozen, sha256-addressed, and reported before they change coverage counts
day_2_rules.noncoverage_rule: not_assayed is reported, never counted as contradiction

day_3_rules.candidate_source: all atlas evidence_attached rows absent from CollecTRI and standard T-cell annotations
day_3_rules.freshness_rule: if no survivor beyond the known three clears, report that as the result without relabeling the known three as new

honest_ceiling: Computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth.

literature_audit_rules.cd4_context_rule: title or abstract must mention CD4, helper T, T helper subset, TCR, or a named CD4 subset
literature_audit_rules.claim_sentence_rule: title or abstract sentence must contain a mapped gene and a pre-registered driver word
literature_audit_rules.comparability_rule: comparable only when the sentence or abstract asserts activation, TCR stimulation, transcriptional program, proliferation, or differentiation in CD4 or helper T-cell context
literature_audit_rules.contradiction_rule: contradicted only when comparability is comparable and strongest Marson on-target effect is 10 or fewer DE genes
literature_audit_rules.dedupe_key: pmid plus approved gene symbol plus normalized claim sentence
literature_audit_rules.gene_mapping: frozen Marson symbols plus committed alias map

literature_audit_rules.support_rule: evidence_attached only when comparability is comparable and strongest Marson on-target effect is greater than 10 DE genes

target_scale.gene_atlas: all 11,526 Marson genes, all Rest, Stim8hr, Stim48hr conditions
target_scale.leaderboard: all novel driver candidates absent from CollecTRI and standard T-cell annotations
target_scale.literature_records: target thousands, stop only at configured max_records or exhausted Europe PMC cursors

typed_status_ladder.contradicted: explicit causal activation-driver claim with comparable readout, but Marson on-target perturbation moves 10 or fewer transcripts at strongest effect
typed_status_ladder.evidence_attached: comparable causal activation-driver claim and Marson on-target perturbation moves more than 10 transcripts at strongest effect
typed_status_ladder.not_assayed: gene is absent from the frozen Marson atlas or lacks comparable on-target coverage
typed_status_ladder.orthogonal_phenotype: claim is about cytokine secretion, exhaustion, disease association, immunotherapy response, or another non-comparable readout
